subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down the verses and revealed the clear proofs on a Day that was promised in His Books and His Scriptures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات فی یوم کان موعودا فی کتبه و زبره و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @high station of the true believer, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
